    Class TiffUnknownType

    The unknown tiff type. In case the tiff tag cannot be recognized this type is instantinated.

    Inheritance
    object
    TiffDataType
    TiffUnknownType
    Inherited Members
    TiffDataType.ReadTag(TiffStreamReader, long)
    TiffDataType.CompareTo(object)
    TiffDataType.DeepClone()
    TiffDataType.WriteTag(TiffStreamWriter, long)
    TiffDataType.Id
    TiffDataType.TagId
    TiffDataType.AlignedDataSize
    TiffDataType.IsValid
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Tiff.TiffTagTypes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class TiffUnknownType : TiffDataType, IComparable
    Remarks

    Note the TiffUnknownType is not serialized back to stream.

    Constructors

    Name Description
    TiffUnknownType(TiffStreamReader, ushort, ushort, uint, uint)

    Initializes a new instance of the TiffUnknownType class.

    Properties

    Name Description
    Count

    Gets the count of elements.
    DataSize

    Gets the additional data size in bytes (in case the 12 bytes is not enough to fit the tag data).
    OffsetOrValue

    Gets the offset value for an additional data or value itself in case count is 1.
    Stream

    Gets the stream to read additional data from.
    TagType

    Gets the tag type.
    Value

    Gets or sets the value this data type contains.

    Methods

    Name Description
    CreateInstance()

    Creates a new instance.
    ReadData(TiffStreamReader, long, long)

    Reads the additional data.
    ToString()

    Returns a string that represents this instance.
    WriteAdditionalData(TiffStreamWriter)

    Writes the additional tag data.
    WriteTagValueOrOffset(TiffStreamWriter, long)

    Writes the tag value or additional offset.
